'''''Star Wars: Grievous Getaway''''' is a mobile [[Star Wars video games|video game]] that was published by [[THQ]] Wireless and released on [[November 8]], [[2005]]. The game takes place during the events of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].

{{Game-stub}}

==Gameplay==
In the game, the player controls [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] riding [[Boga]] as he chases [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] on his [[Tsmeu-6 personal wheel bike|wheel bike]] through the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. The game has five levels. After completing the game it is possible to play again and choose either character, Obi-Wan Kenobi or Grievous.

Although the gameplay itself contains no music, the game's menu plays a MIDI version of "Grievous and the Droids" by [[John Williams]] from the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] for ''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith''.
